Execution Proof Infrastructure

Revenue runs on proof. Your agentic team delivers both.

Category leaders do not pitch orchestration — they show receipts. Six specialists run outreach, proof, build, guard, and expansion with the same spine that wins enterprise procurement.

Book a 15-minute proof call→ See the proof chain→ Download 1-page overview

The flywheel

Attract → Prove → Close → Expand

Every stage runs on the same spine — policy before action, receipt on disk, replay when your client asks. That is the business vibe competitors cannot fake with a slide deck.

01

Attract

Governed outreach — every send scoped, receipted, on brand. Replies land because you lead with proof, not hype.

Start with outreach loop →
→
02

Prove

15-minute screen-share — ALLOW, BLOCK, replay. Your stakeholder sees tamper detection live. That is the demo that sticks.

<5 min · closes pipeline
→
03

Close

Fixed $3–10K loop build — deposit in, balance on PASS, handoff doc included. No hourly glue, no mystery scope.

2–3 weeks · no hourly glue
→
04

Expand

Weekly proof export to your client — retainer from $2K/mo, approval-gated ops. Trust compounds into MRR.

+$2–5K/mo · compound trust

Agency win stories

Proof closes. Deposits follow.

Role labels only — no fake logos. Illustrative outcomes from agencies running the same flywheel.

WINBoutique DFY shop, 4-person

Discovery → 15-min replay → deposit

Proof deck on every invite. Live ALLOW and BLOCK on screen-share. $8K build deposit within 11 days of first call.

HOTRevOps agency, 6-person

BLOCK demo → security-minded client signs

Ops-monitor BLOCK with signed receipt — not a PDF appendix. Client's security lead approved scope same session.

+MRRGTM consultancy, 3-person

Weekly export → retainer renewal

+$2K/mo retainer when weekly proof export landed in client's inbox — approval-gated ops, no surprise hours.

What clients cannot resist

Not a pitch. A live receipt.

Agencies lose deals when the demo is pretty and the audit trail is empty. SourceA flips the script — your buyer watches governance answer in real time.

"Show me what ran last night"

You replay cold — no chat history, no vendor dashboard. ALLOW and BLOCK on disk. Counsel nods. Deal moves.

"What if someone tampers?"

Tamper detection in the demo, not in a PDF appendix. Your client sees the spine protect their brand before they sign.

"Fixed price, fixed timeline"

$3–10K build band, 2–3 weeks to live loop. Deposit on scope, balance on PASS. Retainer expansion is the upsell — not surprise hours.

Revenue math

One governed loop. Four revenue moments.

01

Outreach → discovery

Governed sends with proof attached. 12 sends, 3 replies — every ALLOW receipted. Conversations start with evidence.

02

Demo → deposit

34% proof-to-close when replay is the closer. 11-day average from discovery to deposit. No slide-only follow-ups.

03

Build → handoff

$8K loop in the pipeline today. Policy at dispatch, weekly export in the handoff doc. Your client owns the spine.

04

Retainer → MRR

+$2K/mo expansion when weekly proof export is signed off. Approval-gated ops — trust that renews itself.
